caption: A man with short dark hair, wearing a light blue button-down shirt under a grey blazer, speaks while standing on a stage. He wears a small beige headset microphone. The background is dark, accented by diagonal streaks of purple and yellow light. He is captured in a mid-shot, gesturing with both hands to emphasize his points. In the beginning, he holds his hands up and open in front of him, with his palms facing inward. As the sequence progresses, he continues speaking with an open mouth, and his hands move lower and wider apart, with his right hand shifting slightly toward the edge of the frame. His facial expression remains focused and animated throughout the motion. No text, logos, or other people are visible in the scene.
